questions.question: What does returning false from onErrorCaptured do?
options: It re-throws the error to the parent component
It stops error propagation to parent handlers and app.config.errorHandler
It triggers the global errorHandler immediately
It causes Vue to display the default error page

questions.question: Which error sources does Vue's onErrorCaptured NOT catch?
options: Errors in setTimeout and setInterval callbacks

questions.question: In defineAsyncComponent's onError callback, what does calling retry() do when attempts <= 3?
options: Cancels the async component load entirely
Attempts to load the component again
Logs a warning and continues with a placeholder
